channel.title: HC-Series on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in HC-Series on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: Retirement: End of lift reminder of HBv2/HC-Series/NP-Series Azure Virtual Machine in Azure Batch Pool
item.description:
Azure Batch will retire support for HBv2-series, HC-series, and NP-series VMs in Batch pools on May 31, 2027. The notice applies to these VM sizes only when used in Azure Batch pools.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: Retirement: HC-series Azure Virtual Machines will be retired on May 31, 2027
item.description:
Microsoft Azure will retire HC-series VM sizes Standard_HC44rs, Standard_HC44-16rs, and Standard_HC44-32rs on May 31, 2027. Users should plan to migrate to a current supported VM size before the retirement date.

  • Source: Azure Updates
